frame_analyses.description: Initial view of peg transfer board with 6 rubber objects - 3 orange on left pegs, 3 green on right pegs
Left grasper (non-dominant) picking up orange object from leftmost peg
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean pickup with good instrument control

frame_analyses.description: Orange object being transferred from left to right grasper in midair
Right grasper placing orange object onto right side peg
Right grasper (now non-dominant) picking up green object from right peg
Green object being transferred from right to left grasper
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good coordination in reverse direction

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper placing green object on left side peg
Final configuration with all objects successfully transferred - orange objects on right pegs, green on left pegs

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all transfers and placements. No objects dropped outside field. Completion time clearly observable from start to final placement.
technique_summary: Solid intermediate-level performance with smooth bilateral coordination. All 6 objects successfully transferred in both directions without drops or placement errors.
strengths: Clean hand-to-hand transfers without dropping objects
Consistent technique in both forward and reverse directions
improvement_suggestions: Increase speed of individual transfers to approach expert time of 40-60s
Practice more efficient pickup and placement motions
